_comment: Canonical MCP server roster. Edit this one file; run ./generate.py to emit each editor's format into examples/. Keep this set to servers that work in ANY workspace, even non-git ones. The git server is intentionally NOT in this default because mcp-server-git crashes on startup if the open folder is not a git repo, which most MCP clients surface as 'Failed to connect to git'. To enable it for a specific workspace, add it to your editor's MCP config with: command 'uvx', args ['mcp-server-git', '--repository', '.'], and only open the editor in a real git repo.
